report.title: Exhibit 99.1
headings: SILVER WHEATON TO RELEASE 2009 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR RESULTS ON MARCH 4, 2010
report.text:
EX-99.1
2
exhibit99-1.htm
NEWS RELEASE FEBRUARY 5, 2010

 Exhibit 99.1

Exhibit 99.1

 
 

 FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE 
 TSX:SLW 

 February 5, 2010 
 NYSE:SLW 
SILVER WHEATON TO RELEASE 2009 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR RESULTS ON MARCH 4, 2010
Vancouver, British Columbia – Silver Wheaton Corp. (TSX, NYSE:SLW) will release 2009 full year results on Thursday, March 4, 2010, after market close.
A conference call will be held Friday, March 5, 2010, at 11:00 am (Eastern Time) to discuss these results. To participate in the live call use one of the following methods:

 
 

 Dial toll free from Canada or the US: 
 1-888-231-8191 

 Dial from outside Canada or the US: 
 1-647-427-7450 

 Live audio webcast: 
 www.silverwheaton.com 
Participants should dial in five to ten minutes before the call.
The conference call will be recorded and you can listen to an archive of the call by one of the following methods:

 
 

 Dial toll free from Canada or the US: 
 1-800-642-1687 

 Dial from outside Canada or the US: 
 1-416-849-0833 

 Pass code: 
 53023062 

 Archived audio webcast: 
 www.silverwheaton.com 
For further information, please contact:
Brad Kopp
Vice President, Investor Relations 
Silver Wheaton Corp.
Tel: 1-800-380-8687
Email: info@silverwheaton.com
Website: www.silverwheaton.com

Exhibit 99.1


FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE  TSX:SLW 
February 5, 2010  NYSE:SLW 

SILVER WHEATON TO RELEASE 2009 FOURTH QUARTER AND FULL YEAR RESULTS ON MARCH 4, 2010

Vancouver, British Columbia – Silver Wheaton Corp. (TSX, NYSE:SLW) will release 2009 full year results on Thursday, March 4, 2010, after market close.

A conference call will be held Friday, March 5, 2010, at 11:00 am (Eastern Time) to discuss these results. To participate in the live call use one of the following methods:

Dial toll free from Canada or the US:  1-888-231-8191 
Dial from outside Canada or the US:  1-647-427-7450 
Live audio webcast:  www.silverwheaton.com 

Participants should dial in five to ten minutes before the call.

The conference call will be recorded and you can listen to an archive of the call by one of the following methods:

Dial toll free from Canada or the US:  1-800-642-1687 
Dial from outside Canada or the US:  1-416-849-0833 
Pass code:  53023062 
Archived audio webcast:  www.silverwheaton.com 

For further information, please contact:

Brad Kopp
Vice President, Investor Relations
Silver Wheaton Corp.
Tel: 1-800-380-8687
Email: info@silverwheaton.com
